name: SK-II Facial Treatment Cleansing Oil
pros: Patented Pitera ingredient (proprietary yeast filtrate) provides visible skin renewal beyond basic cleansing
Luxury formula trusted by millions globally; 4.75★ with consistent positive feedback on texture and results
Removes makeup efficiently while treating skin, justifying premium positioning
cons: At ¥9,350 for 250mL, significantly more expensive than FANCL's equivalent product
Premium positioning means limited accessibility; primarily found in high-end department stores or online
shortDescription: Premium cleansing oil with Pitera yeast extract—SK-II's signature treatment in every use.
review: SK-II's Cleansing Oil represents Japanese luxury skincare at its finest. The Pitera ingredient, a proprietary yeast-derived filtrate, genuinely transforms your routine from basic makeup removal to skin treatment. While ¥9,350 is steep, the 250mL bottle lasts longer than cheaper alternatives, and results are noticeable. Highly recommended for foreigners seeking indulgent, effective skincare—though expect to find it primarily through online retailers or premium counters.
